feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: want and desire
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,560Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: The conversation always started the same way.Merlin would be scrolling on his phone, half-draped over the arm of the sofa in a position that suggested his spine had given up. Arthur would be doing something completely mundane — eating cereal, watching telly, existing — and then Merlin would say it."You should go on a date."Arthur didn't even look up from his bowl this time. "No.""Seriously, Arthur—""Still no."

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

  • Self-Esteem Issues

entry.title: Albion's Greatest Need
entry.summary:
Author: AngelOfAlbion

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,636Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 44

Summary: “I did not want you to feel that you were alone.” With closed eyes, Merlin reached upward and imagined Arthur’s warm hand wrapping around his own. There was a sick irony in hearing this now, in these final moments. “I did not want you to feel that you were alone.” For Merlin was alone. He died alone. ـــــــــــــــــــﮩ٨ـ After fifteen hundred years, the cessation of Magic forces 'Albion's Greatest Need' to emerge. When both Arthur and Merlin are resurrected, it's Merlin's duty to teach the King of Camelot modern innovation. However, resurrection is not enough, and destiny forces redemption. Or Merlin and Arthur get thrown back in time to their convention with The Disir, only this time, they have no choice but to accept magic.

entry.title: all the rooms of the castle except this one
entry.summary:
Author: theleftoveryou

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 526Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: …it is winter, the first time. Arthur comes sweeping in the front hall of the castle, and he is wearing his long brown coat, with mud splatters along the hem, looking like a proper king, though he is no king, only a prince yet. He comes sweeping Merlin into an alcove, sweeping in like a windstorm, rainstorm, there is a storm in his eyes, searching, finding something hidden…

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,695Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 32

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Internal Conflict
entry.summary:
Author: kacchans_clotpole

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 60,731Chapters: 11/11Kudos: 11

Summary: Merlin was raised by the druids and was taught that it was his destiny to murder Arthur Pendragon and end the bloody reign that the Tyrant King held in a chokehold. He would restore magic to the lands following the burial of the Pendragon dynasty. One day, the druids stained their hands with something similar to Emrys’s sins - they had captured a small group of passer-byers that posed a threat. 2 knights from Camelot were among the four. Emrys had the displeasure of dealing with them first, simply intimidating them until someone of a higher authority would tell him whether they wanted them dead or not. Unfortunately, Merlin had always been a curious lad. Little did he know, trying to be anything more than a murderer to this miniature mass would be his fate - his destiny. He was talking with the reason he was born. What happens when he betrays everything he’s learned for the sake of hoping that this man would reach out, over a chance to love? What happens when he binds himself to Arthur using magic? Will Arthur meet the conditions of being open to learning magic? Will he actually ever have to meet his; saving Arthur’s from danger?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Just a Little Fun
entry.summary:
Author: THELASTDRAGON

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,180Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 76

Summary: Merlin arrives in Camelot and meets an arrogant, infuriatingly attractive knight. Who he thinks is just some Noble's son who wants to get dicked down by a peasant. While Merlin is happy to play along - nothing in Camelot is ever what it seems—and his simple fun is about to get so much more complicated.

entry.title: Forever Yours - Am Byth Yn Eiddo I Chi
entry.summary:
Author: Angelmann

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,708Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 20

Summary: King Arthur of Camelot faces catastrophe after catastrophe. His people and his land have fallen victim to reoccuring tragedies and despite their efforts, they are not only losing resources, but also hope. Arthur is in desperate need of a solution.An arranged marriage might save his people from impending doom, but Arthur has to face a long strained relationship with his neighbours, the Druids. Arthur and the Druid Emperor, Emrys, have to overcome their differences, but if they are willing to change is only written in the stars.

entry.title: kiss me under the light of a thousand stars
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,924Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: Merlin arrived as the light began to fade. “You’re late,” Arthur said. Merlin huffed, brushing stray leaves from his sleeves. “Some of us have responsibilities, sire.” Arthur snorted softly. “I do not recall excusing you from them.” “No,” Merlin agreed, glancing between them, eyes lingering just a moment too long in quiet assessment. “You rarely do.” Freya smiled at him, open and bright, and whatever Merlin had been about to say softened into something quieter.

entry.summary:
Author: Theroundbartable

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,014Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 233

entry.title: Go Along Aching
entry.summary:
Author: atlasmorgan

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,342Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 46

Summary: Magic has been legalized. Camelot and the court are getting used to it. But still, Arthur knows better than anyone how quickly a kingdom can change from one reign to another, and he wants to make sure that the protections he has in place for magic users are harder to unbind than just the slash of a quill through rewritten laws. So he goes to the Druids. Proposes a formal treaty. He doesn't expect it to come in the form of a marriage proposal, and he really doesn't expect it to be Emrys they want him to marry. -or- The one where Arthur tries to make a treaty and ends up marrying Emrys instead. He's got no idea that Merlin is Emrys.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 93,979Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 83

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

entry.title: just close your eyes, you'll be alright
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 543Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Arthur leaned against the fig tree opposite Gwen. He had not realized how tightly he had been wound until now. Until Gwen laughed again. Safe. All of them safe.

entry.title: Essetir’s Kings Manservant
entry.summary:
Author: RamonaflowersFrFr

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,105Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Before Hunith had decided to send Merlin to Camelot he went to try and convince King Cenred to help protect his village, one thing after another Cenred decided he liked the boy and he would be appointed his manservant — Camelot and Essetir are having feast in Camelots attempt at a peace treaty, Arthur finds himself allured by the Manservant and keeps going back to him throughout the feast, Merlin is equally as intrigued in Arthur, he can feel his magic pulling him towards Arthur every moment they’re together.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
